case_title: ROBIN REICHERT VS. TONY CARRACCI et al

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-17-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ROBIN REICHERT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JAN-21-2015 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR THE STATUS OF PLAINTIFF'S COLLECTION OF THE JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT TONY CARRACCI. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-21-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ROBIN REICHERT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
